## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content publishing, SEO strategy, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publish Approved Articles:** Brock will tag Mike T. and Erik Shah on approved PRs to unblock publishing, bypassing the stalled GitHub Projects workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**SEO Strategy:** Adopt a "descriptivist" SEO approach. Use high-volume search terms (e.g., "Linux MDM") in titles to capture traffic, then use the article to "correct the record" and define the correct terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Syncs will shift to bi-weekly for 2026, with weekly Slack updates and quarterly strategic reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The standard publishing workflow is stalled.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Blocker:** GrowthX lacks website access and cannot directly publish approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** External collaborators (e.g., Suleman) cannot be added to the GitHub Projects board to manage labels and statuses. John has an open request with Sam to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** Publish approved articles immediately to test the end-to-end process.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Action:** Brock will tag Mike T. and Erik Shah on approved PRs to trigger publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Future Enhancement:** A blog landing page with articles organized by topic tags (e.g., "GitOps") is needed for better user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### SEO Strategy: Descriptivist vs. Prescriptivist

  - [**Debate:** Use industry-standard terms vs. correct inaccurate but popular search terms.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [**Decision:** Adopt a "descriptivist" approach to capture traffic from user-facing search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To rank for a term, the article title must use that term. The article's body can then "correct the record" and educate the reader.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [**Example: "Linux MDM"**](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Search Volume:** 110 monthly searches (SEMrush).](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Action:** Create the article. The title will use the search term to rank, while the content will explain why "Linux MDM" is a misnomer and introduce the correct concept of Linux endpoint management.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

### Content Backlog Review

  - [**"Mac Fleet Management"**](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
      - [**Concern:** The generic use of "fleet" is confusing with the product name.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The title is a strong keyword signal. The article will be written using the "descriptivist" approach to capture search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [**"Corporate iPhone Management"**](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [**Action:** Update the year in the title for timeliness.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**"Best Linux MDM Solutions"**](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Action:** Approved, following the "descriptivist" strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/wboNNG6-r_sBEwtQFz_-RnXCQjj98u-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
